title: ATAH Stage 3 Contact Release
description: ATAH Registry Operation Profile object: body of POST /v1/introductions/{handoff_id}/stage-3 (spec/v0.8 Section 6). Personal contact details land in the transient encrypted vault for authenticated retrieval — they are not transmitted to the professional via SMS or email. Required for implementations claiming Registry Conformance.

phone.description: E.164 international phone format (leading +, country code, up to 15 digits total).

examples.matter_summary: Drafting a vendor-side master services agreement for a 12-month engagement.
